vocab.meaning: hấp thụ, tiếp thu (kiến thức) một cách nhanh chóng và dễ dàng
vocab.example: In primary school, I used to soak up every bit of information during Science lessons because I was so fascinated by nature.

vocab.meaning: say mê, hào hứng quá mức về một chủ đề cụ thể nào đó
vocab.example: I would totally geek out over History books, spending hours reading about ancient civilizations.

vocab.meaning: mất tập trung, thả hồn theo mây gió
vocab.example: To be honest, I tended to drift off during Math classes, but I was always wide awake for Art.

vocab.meaning: vượt qua một cách dễ dàng (bài tập, kỳ thi)
vocab.example: English was my forte, so I usually managed to breeze through all the creative writing assignments.

vocab.meaning: tụt hậu, không theo kịp chương trình học
vocab.example: I never wanted to fall behind in Music class because playing the recorder was the highlight of my week.

vocab.meaning: nhìn lại (một kỷ niệm hoặc thời gian trong quá khứ)
vocab.example: When I look back on my primary school days, PE stands out as the subject that brought me the most joy.

vocab.meaning: nghịch ngợm, làm việc không nghiêm túc
vocab.example: While other kids liked to mess around during lab time, I was always serious about my Science experiments.

vocab.meaning: thấu hiểu một vấn đề phức tạp
vocab.example: It took me a while to get my head around long division, but my teacher made the process quite enjoyable.
Among all the subjects, Geography really stood out to me because I loved learning about different countries.

vocab.meaning: thử sức, làm quen một chút với một lĩnh vực
vocab.example: We got to dabble in various art forms, from pottery to sketching, which made Art class very dynamic.
